reason: Verdict changed Not Demonstrated -> Self-Contradicted with amended patches (EXP-295). Added detail_verdict_text patch replacing verbatim Not Demonstrated verdict-label with SC-framed structural-foreclosure text. tldr_verdict rewritten to drop false dilemma-already-in-prose claim (curmudgeon blocking hole #2). Analyst may wish to add dilemma framing explicitly to detail_evidence/extra to make the two-horn structure verbatim, and foreground lambda_A=4283 Mpc as second SC horn.

Decider self-applied grammar fix (ISS-1989) to detail_verdict_text: restored parentheses around "published MT and ELF spectral literature" in post-hoc paragraph. The analyst's c4-H2 carry-over (minor: add quantitative harmonic line) is now tracked as ISS-1993 (assigned-analyst).

PATCH-322-A (EXP-322/ISS-1814): detail_reasoning extended ~890 chars with §2 self-contradiction pattern cross-reference (V13 Finsler loop, retrospective fitting, version retuning). Analyst should verify §2.9 reference resolves correctly in rendered HTML and prose flows without introducing new claims.

Three citation/attribution fixes applied to SEC-6.14: Kim & Chang DOI .024→.022 (ISS-1999), Hinderer et al. replaces Bernard et al. 2022 (ISS-2000), Monte Carlo attribution softened (ISS-1988). Analyst should confirm the 4 new EXPs (360-363) assigned for SEC-6.14 kappa-cluster prose are well-scoped and not duplicating existing expansions.

tldr_verdict patched this run: "bounded firmament (max ~30,000 km)" replaced with "disc diameter 40,030 km, firmament height 9,086 km"; "maximum spatial extent of 30,000 km" replaced with "disc diameter of 40,030 km". WIN-052 tldr and WIN-054 detail_verdict_text also patched to remove 30,000 km figure. Analyst should verify science holds and no downstream sec-6 cross-references used the 30,000 km figure.
